name: Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Chicken And Carrot 50g
shortDescription: Spectrum Gusto Soup with Chicken and Carrot is a healthy and flavorful 50g cat treat, perfect for cats and kittens of all ages. Made with tender chicken breast and sweet carrot in a savory fish broth, this complementary snack is designed to enhance mealtime or serve as a rewarding treat. Its high moisture content helps support hydration and overall wellbeing, while being low in fat for a healthy addition to your cat’s diet.
description: Key Features: Real Ingredients: 25% chicken breast and 4.7% carrot for natural flavor and nutrition. Hydrating Snack: 90% moisture content helps keep your cat hydrated. Flavorful Fish Broth: Adds taste and encourages picky eaters to enjoy their meals. Easy to Serve: Convenient 50g pouch, perfect for portioning with a spoon. Suitable for All Ages: Can be given to kittens and adult cats. Versatile Use: Ideal as a snack, reward, or meal topper. Ingredients: Water Chicken breast 25.40% Carrot 4.7% Fish broth Natural thickeners: Tapioca starch (E1442) and Guar gum (E412) Nutritional Information (per pouch): Crude Protein: 8% Crude Fat: 0.2% Crude Ash: 1% Crude Fiber: 0.1% Moisture: 90% Feeding Guidelines: Serve in small portions using a spoon. Can be offered as a treat, daily snack, or meal topper. Always ensure fresh drinking water is available. Not a complete meal – intended as a complementary food. Packaging Options: Single 50g pouch Pack of 12 for convenience and frequent snacking Benefits: Supports hydration due to high moisture content. Encourages picky eaters to enjoy meals. Easy-to-serve and mess-free. Strengthens bonding during playtime or training sessions. Low-fat, nutritious, and delicious. Why Choose Spectrum Gusto Soup with Chicken and Carrot? This cat soup offers a combination of nutrition, flavor, and convenience. It’s perfect for cat owners who want to provide a tasty treat that supports hydration and encourages healthy snacking habits. Ideal for daily rewards or enhancing the flavor of regular meals, it’s a high-quality option for every cat.
